    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler

    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler

]

    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., ACC, motor actuation, steering servo) are generated by the Controlling FE, processed by the Data Translation component, and transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP to physical actuators. Specific command message formats, validation, authentication, feedback mechanisms, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization with 100 ms accuracy required for computation offloading, driven by safety-critical vehicular application standards; hardware limitations necessitate this specific temporal granularity for physical-digital component synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture based on ISO 23247 Reference Architecture; SW components organized into Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities, each deployed as ROS2 packages on separate hardware. Physical Twin Entity hosts general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), differing from standard's OME by encompassing inherent system resources. User Interface FE split into visualization and control panel subcomponents; Data Storage component lacks aligned FE."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 is used for intra-system software component communication, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, reliability mechanisms, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture) defining entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Part 4 (Information Exchange) governs data interoperability, with implementations utilizing OPC Unified Architecture for device communication and data exchange."
]
